category_sources: source_facts.description says it stores private data inside a git repo; official docs describe git-secret as encrypting files with trusted users' public keys.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-secret; official website and GitHub README use git-secret.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation site; official GitHub repository links to sobolevn.me/git-secret and includes README documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sobolevn/git-secret, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names private data in git; official website and README describe encrypting files with PGP/GPG keys and storing secrets in a git repository.
